name: humanspec_GTF2I_para_orangutan
description: Human-specific duplicon contrast: GTF2I_para. Status in Pongo abelii: 'ape_shared_duplicon'. In human (GRCh38) the locus sits on chr7:~74.1 Mb; in this ape the syntenic region is approximated on chr7. Used by LLmap to refuse silent absorption of human-vs-ape divergence when mapping cross-species reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Reference contrast for GTF2I_para. See Dennis 2012, Suntsova 2017, T2T-ape 2024 for duplicon-by-duplicon presence calls.

related_diseases: human-specific cortex expansion / neurodevelopmental dosage (e.g. GTF2I_para)
